package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for operational_command_handlers_reuse_http_services_without_adapter: CLI or cron entrypoints that import Gin-only service contracts instead of neutral application services.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule104NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule104NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule104NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario104Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule104NegativeService, input Rule104NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
